title: pelargonium × fairliae
intro: Pelargonium × fairliae, also known as Red Form Rosy Glow or Fairlie's Geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium peltatum and Pelargonium fasciculatum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × fairliae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from fever and headaches. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
